title: Country Draft
shortDescription: Assign countries to their strongest stat categories
description: 8 categories. 8 countries revealed one by one. Assign each country to the category where it ranks highest globally. Beat the optimal score.

title: Flag Quiz
description: A flag appears — can you name the country? Test your vexillology knowledge across all nations.

title: Higher or Lower
description: Two countries, one stat. Pick which is higher. Keep your streak alive as long as possible.

title: Capital Match
description: Given a country, pick the correct capital from four options. How well do you know world capitals?

title: Population Sort
description: Drag and sort countries from highest to lowest for a given statistic. Accuracy matters.

title: Country Streak
shortDescription: How many can you get right in a row?
description: Identify countries from their flags. One wrong answer and it's game over. How long can you streak?

title: Border Buddies
description: A country appears. Can you name every country that shares a border with it?

title: Continent Sprint
shortDescription: Name all countries in a continent
description: Pick a continent and name every country in it as fast as you can. The clock is ticking.

title: Stat Guesser
description: What's the population of Brazil? The GDP of Norway? Guess the number — closer is better.

title: Speed Flags
description: 60 seconds. How many flags can you correctly identify? Speed and accuracy both count.

title: Odd One Out
description: Four countries. Three share a trait. One doesn't. Find the odd one out and explain why.
